description: Android SDK for Termux by mumumusuc. Includes build-tools 35, platform-tools, NDK 27 and CMake. All bundled in the .deb — no sdkmanager downloads required.

install_steps.command: apt-get update -y 2>&1 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends openjdk-17 curl 2>&1
dpkg -i $DOWNLOAD_PATH 2>&1; apt-get install -f -y 2>&1; dpkg -l android-sdk 2>&1 | grep -q '^ii' || (echo 'ERROR: android-sdk package not installed' && exit 1)
install_steps.description: Installing Android SDK .deb (includes build-tools 35, NDK, CMake)

install_steps.command: grep -qxF 'export ANDROID_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-sdk"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export ANDROID_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-sdk"' >> $HOME/.bashrc && grep -qxF 'export ANDROID_NDK_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export ANDROID_NDK_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk"' >> $HOME/.bashrc && grep -qxF 'export PATH="$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools"' >> $HOME/.bashrc
install_steps.description: Adding ANDROID_HOME, ANDROID_NDK_HOME and PATH to .bashrc

install_steps.command: SDKMANAGER="$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager" && test -f "$SDKMANAGER" || (echo "ERROR: sdkmanager not found at $SDKMANAGER" && exit 1) && ln -sf "$SDKMANAGER" "$PREFIX/bin/sdkmanager" && echo 'sdkmanager symlink created'

config_steps.command: apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gradle android-tools 2>&1 && adb version 2>&1

test -d "$ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/35.0.0" && echo 'build-tools/35.0.0 OK' || echo 'WARNING: build-tools/35.0.0 not found, check $ANDROID_HOME' && test -d "$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk" && echo 'NDK OK' || echo 'WARNING: NDK not found'
config_steps.description: Verifying build-tools and NDK are present

config_steps.command: set -e; JDTLS_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/jdtls; mkdir -p $JDTLS_DIR; mkdir -p $PREFIX/tmp; JDTLS_URL=$(curl -fsSL 'https://api.github.com/repos/eclipse-jdtls/eclipse.jdt.ls/releases/latest' 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'https://[^"]*tar.gz' | grep jdt-language-server | head -1); if [ -z "$JDTLS_URL" ]; then echo 'GitHub API failed, using fallback version 1.41.0'; JDTLS_URL='https://github.com/eclipse-jdtls/eclipse.jdt.ls/releases/download/v1.41.0/jdt-language-server-1.41.0-202501161652.tar.gz'; fi; echo "Downloading jdtls from $JDTLS_URL"; curl -fsSL -o $PREFIX/tmp/jdtls.tar.gz "$JDTLS_URL"; if command -v pigz >/dev/null 2>&1; then tar --use-compress-program=pigz -xf $PREFIX/tmp/jdtls.tar.gz -C $JDTLS_DIR; else tar xzf $PREFIX/tmp/jdtls.tar.gz -C $JDTLS_DIR; fi; rm -f $PREFIX/tmp/jdtls.tar.gz; echo 'OK: jdtls installed'
config_steps.description: Downloading and extracting jdtls (Java language server)

config_steps.command: set -e; KLS_VER=1.3.13; KLS_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/kotlin-language-server; mkdir -p $KLS_DIR; mkdir -p $PREFIX/tmp; echo "Downloading Kotlin Language Server $KLS_VER"; curl -fsSL -o $PREFIX/tmp/kls.zip "https://github.com/fwcd/kotlin-language-server/releases/download/$KLS_VER/server.zip"; unzip -o $PREFIX/tmp/kls.zip -d $KLS_DIR; rm -f $PREFIX/tmp/kls.zip; chmod +x $KLS_DIR/server/bin/kotlin-language-server; ln -sf $KLS_DIR/server/bin/kotlin-language-server $PREFIX/bin/kotlin-language-server; echo "OK: kotlin-language-server $KLS_VER installed"
config_steps.description: Downloading and installing Kotlin Language Server v1.3.13

config_steps.command: set -e; LEMMINX_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/lemminx; mkdir -p $LEMMINX_DIR; LEMMINX_URL=$(curl -fsSL 'https://api.github.com/repos/eclipse/lemminx/releases/latest' 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'https://[^"]*uber.jar' | head -1); if [ -z "$LEMMINX_URL" ]; then echo 'GitHub API failed, using fallback version 0.27.0'; LEMMINX_URL='https://github.com/eclipse/lemminx/releases/download/0.27.0/org.eclipse.lemminx-0.27.0-uber.jar'; fi; echo "Downloading LemMinX from $LEMMINX_URL"; curl -fsSL -L -o $LEMMINX_DIR/lemminx.jar "$LEMMINX_URL"; echo 'OK: LemMinX installed'

(set -e; JDTLS_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/jdtls; JAR=$(ls $JDTLS_DIR/plugins/org.eclipse.equinox.launcher_*.jar 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -1); [ -n "$JAR" ] || (echo 'ERROR: jdtls launcher jar not found' && exit 1); CONFIG=$JDTLS_DIR/config_linux_arm64; [ -d "$CONFIG" ] || CONFIG=$JDTLS_DIR/config_linux; [ -d "$CONFIG" ] || (echo 'ERROR: jdtls config dir not found' && exit 1); WRAPPER=$PREFIX/bin/jdtls; printf '#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
JDTLS_DIR="%s"
JAR=$(ls "$JDTLS_DIR/plugins/org.eclipse.equinox.launcher_"*.jar 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -1)
[ -n "$JAR" ] || { echo "jdtls: launcher jar not found" >&2; exit 1; }
CONFIG="$JDTLS_DIR/config_linux_arm64"
[ -d "$CONFIG" ] || CONFIG="$JDTLS_DIR/config_linux"
DATA="${JDTLS_DATA_DIR:-$HOME/.jdtls-data}"
mkdir -p "$DATA"
exec java --add-modules=ALL-SYSTEM --add-opens java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED -Declipse.application=org.eclipse.jdt.ls.core.id1 -Dosgi.bundles.defaultStartLevel=4 -Declipse.product=org.eclipse.jdt.ls.core.product -Dlog.level=ERROR -noverify -jar "$JAR" -configuration "$CONFIG" -data "$DATA" "$@"
' "$JDTLS_DIR" > "$WRAPPER"; chmod +x "$WRAPPER"; echo "jdtls wrapper created at $WRAPPER") 2>&1 && echo 'OK: jdtls wrapper script created' || echo 'WARNING: jdtls wrapper creation failed'
config_steps.description: Creating jdtls launcher wrapper script at $PREFIX/bin/jdtls

uninstall_steps.description: Removing Android SDK and NDK directories
Removing Java LSP (jdtls), Kotlin Language Server, and XML LSP (LemMinX)
